title: Inst. Ahmet MUĞRABİ
content:
amugrabi@29mayis.edu.tr

Resume

Full Time

Resume

Lect. Ahmet Muğrabi holds a Bachelor’s degree in Arabic Language and Literature and a Master’s degree in Linguistics from Hashemite University. In 2007, he ranked 71st among 770 students nationwide in the Undergraduate University Proficiency Examination conducted across Jordan.

He has eight years of professional experience (2007–2014) teaching Arabic to native speakers in private schools in Jordan, as well as ten years of experience (2014–2024) teaching Arabic to non-native speakers at two different universities in Türkiye.

Ahmet Muğrabi has served on numerous occasions as a jury member in competitions related to public speaking, poetry, and nasheed (religious chants). In addition to his native Arabic, he is also proficient in Turkish.

Between 2015 and 2017, he consecutively worked as a consultant on various external projects designed for high-achieving preparatory class students in Imam Hatip schools. He is currently serving as a Lecturer in the Arabic Preparatory Program within the School of Foreign Languages at Istanbul 29 Mayıs University.
